wins: AI revenue surged 280% year-on-year to $3.1 billion
VMware integration progressing well with ABV growth from $1.2 billion to $1.9 billion
Raising fiscal 2024 revenue guidance to $51 billion
Networking revenue growth expected to reach 40% year-on-year
Strong customer adoption of VMware's self-service virtual private cloud
risks: Broadband revenue expected to decline high 30s year-on-year
Server storage revenue down 27% year-on-year with modest recovery expected
Wireless revenue flat year-on-year despite content increases
Cyclical weakness in semiconductor revenue from enterprises and telcos
Competition from NVIDIA in AI accelerators and Ethernet switching
